title: Create: Poly12gon's Easy Guns
description: Datapack for Create and MrCrayfish's Gun Mod. You can make guns of 3 tiers(andesite alloy, brass, netherite).
body:
# Make Guns Easily! [With Create]
## Features
- Make guns by item application
- Andesite, brass and netherite guns
- Uses metal(iron, andesite alloy, gold) as bullets
- Higher tier guns consume a lot of metal(Make your farms bigger)
## Required
- Minecraft 1.19.2
- Forge
- Create
- MrCrayfish's Gun Mod
- Framework
## Recommended
- Just Enough Items
